headline: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Stock After 103% One-Year Surge Is It Time To Pause
summary: For investors wondering whether C.H. Robinson Worldwide remains attractively priced after its strong run, or whether the easier gains may already have occurred, this article focuses on what the current valuation is indicating. C.H. Robinson Worldwide shares last closed at US$185.04, following a week in which the stock declined 4.5%. Even so, it is still up 13.0% year to date and 102.9% over the past year. These moves come against a backdrop of ongoing attention on global freight and...
